title: Raffles
writer: John Van Druten, Sidney Howard, E.W. Hornung
actors: David Niven, Olivia de Havilland, May Whitty
plot: Man about town and first class cricketer A.J. Raffles keeps himself solvent with daring robberies. Meeting Gwen from his schooldays and falling in love all over again, he spends the weekend with her parents, Lord and Lady Melrose....
